info.title: KeiviCli
info.description: KiotViet DLL Copier - Automated DLL distribution tool for KiotViet projects across different build environments

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
KiotViet DLL Copier is a comprehensive tool for automated distribution of DLL files across different build environments.

AVAILABLE COMMANDS:
  dll    Copy DLL files to target environments

Use 'KiotVietDllCopier <command> --help' for more information about a specific command.

commands.name: dll
commands.description:
Copy DLL files from build output to target environments with support for multiple frameworks and packages.

USAGE:
  KiotVietDllCopier dll [options]

MODES:
  Interactive Mode: Use --interactive to select project path, environment, and packages through a menu
  CLI Mode: Specify all parameters via command line arguments

EXAMPLES:
  # Interactive mode
  KiotVietDllCopier dll --interactive

  # Copy all DLLs for Release environment
  KiotVietDllCopier dll --project-path "C:\MyProject" --environment Release

  # Copy specific packages with verbose output
  KiotVietDllCopier dll --project-path "C:\MyProject" --packages Package1,Package2 --verbose

  # Dry run to see what would be copied
  KiotVietDllCopier dll --dry-run --project-path "C:\MyProject"

  # Use PowerShell implementation
  KiotVietDllCopier dll --project-path "C:\MyProject" --use-powershell

ENVIRONMENTS:
  - Develop (default): Development environment
  - Sandbox: Testing environment  
  - Release: Production release
  - Debug: Debug build environment
